name: Wilderness Castle Encounters
description: Ponds on the map are castles; occupants sortie on 1-3 over the castle hex, 1-2 one hex out, 1 two hexes out, and always answer a hail unless the party looks too strong. Determine occupant and guards per the castle table; hostility 1-3, neutrality 4-6 (Patriarchs always Lawful, Evil High Priests always Chaotic). Fighting-Men demand jousts of like class (CHAINMAIL rules — winner takes the loser's armor, or the victorious traveler earns a month's hosting, two weeks' rations, and warhorses); Magic-Users send passersby for treasure under Geas or exact a magic item or 1,000-4,000 GP; Clerics tithe 10%.
